days.title: Kopitiam morning · wife arrives LH780
days.summary: Solo morning at Albert Centre + Keong Saik, then T2 pickup, Makansutra dinner and Paramore tribute.

days.title: CapitaSpring · Fort Canning · Esplanade evening
days.summary: Together for the first full day — 51F rooftop farm, Fort Canning, Merlion Park, free Esplanade show and Spectra.

days.title: Gardens by the Bay — the big one
days.summary: Toast Box + Sultan Mosque morning, Hjh Maimunah nasi padang, then Flower Dome / Cloud Forest / Botero / Garden Rhapsody.

days.title: Southern ridges · Henderson Waves · CÉ LA VI
days.summary: Mount Faber, Henderson Waves bridge at treetop height, VivoCity lunch, then CÉ LA VI 57F sundowner and Spectra.

days.title: Chinatown · bumboat · tomato hotpot
days.summary: Oh Wunder brunch, Chinatown temples + shophouses, Maxwell, river cruise at sunset, XiaoYanZhi hotpot.

days.title: Katong + Jewel sendoff
days.summary: Slow Katong morning, 328 laksa, Jewel Rain Vortex, flight home.

places.name: Albert Centre breakfast
places.description: 5-minute walk from the hotel. Back-row stalls: bak kut teh (peppery pork rib soup), chwee kueh, soon kueh.

places.name: Keong Saik & Bukit Pasoh walk
places.description: Singapore's prettiest restored shophouses — former brothel district turned boutique hotel zone. Quiet on Sunday mornings.

places.name: Hong Lim Market & Food Centre
places.description: Off-tourist-track hawker at 531A Upper Cross St. Ji Ji Wanton Mee inside; Ya Hua Bak Kut Teh nearby. Bib Gourmand curry chicken noodle on level 2.
places.pregnancyNotes: Bak kut teh and wanton mee fully cooked.

places.name: Changi T2 — wife arrives LH780
places.description: Leave hotel 15:30. Track LH780 via the Changi Airport app. Wait near Arrivals Hall A (Starbucks). Flight lands 16:30; realistic exit 17:45–18:00 (deplane + immigration + bags from a 747).
tips: Tanah Merah is the interchange — take the Changi Airport branch there.
Grab home justified: jet-lagged pregnant wife + luggage + heat (~SGD 25, 30 min via ECP).

places.name: Makansutra Gluttons Bay
places.description: Outdoor hawker stalls right next to the Esplanade outdoor theatre. Marina Bay view + MBS skyline. Chicken rice, satay, char kway teow, sugar cane juice. Eat at picnic tables 1 min from the show grass.
places.pregnancyNotes: Stick to fully cooked options. Skip oyster omelette, raw cockle dishes, sambal belacan.

places.name: Paramore Tribute — elysrei
places.description: "Paramore & more & more" by elysrei & friends at the DBS Foundation Outdoor Theatre. Free, grass seating, leave anytime.
places.pregnancyNotes: Sit on the grass, leave anytime. Bring a small umbrella or poncho — May can rain.

places.name: Antler & Ember (hotel restaurant)
places.description: Hotel restaurant at 78 Waterloo St. Breakfast buffet with hot dishes, pastries, fruits. Early start to catch CapitaSpring walk-ins.
places.pregnancyNotes: Ask for hard-boiled eggs if runny options are on the buffet.

places.name: CapitaSpring Sky Garden
places.description: 360° city view from the 51st-floor rooftop urban farm at 88 Market St. SGD 10 walk-in with a drink voucher. Arrive by 8:25am for best chance at walk-ins. Backup: Green Oasis at levels 17–20.
places.pregnancyNotes: Lifts only, flat walking, benches at top. Bring a hat — sun is intense on the rooftop.
tips: Walk-in only — book 2 weeks ahead is not possible now.
Backup if full: Green Oasis levels 17-20, often less booked.

places.name: Fort Canning Park
places.description: Tree Tunnel spiral staircase (the photo spot), Spice Garden, Sundial Garden, ASEAN Sculpture Park. Flat shaded paths.
places.pregnancyNotes: Flat and shaded — comfortable.

places.name: National Museum of Singapore
places.description: Heavily air-conditioned. The History Gallery gives the best trip context. Adults SGD 15. 5 min downhill from Fort Canning.
places.pregnancyNotes: AC throughout, benches available.

places.name: Funan Mall lunch
places.description: AC food court at 107 North Bridge Rd. Picnic Funan food hall on level 7 has better-rated stalls.
places.pregnancyNotes: Stick to thoroughly cooked options.

places.name: Civic District & Merlion Park
places.description: Padang → St Andrew's Cathedral → Esplanade Park → Merlion Park. The 8.6m lion-fish statue spouting water into Marina Bay. Iconic photo, big view of MBS.
places.pregnancyNotes: Flat, breezy at sunset.

places.name: Esplanade Roof Garden
places.description: Free public roof garden — lift up Esplanade Mall. Sweeping Marina Bay view, far less crowded than MBS.
tips: Plan to be here by 6:30pm for golden hour.

places.name: Esplanade Concourse free show
places.description: Free 30–60 min indoor AC performance at the Esplanade Concourse — dance, music, or theatre. Programme posted that day at esplanade.com.
places.pregnancyNotes: Indoor AC seated show — ideal.

places.name: Spectra at Marina Bay
places.description: Free 9pm light and water show. Walk 10 min via Helix Bridge from the Esplanade. Watch from the waterfront promenade.

places.name: Toast Box, Bugis Junction
places.description: Reliable kaya toast chain at 200 Victoria St, Bugis Junction. Toast set, kopi. 8 min walk from hotel.
places.pregnancyNotes: Ask for HARD-BOILED eggs — skip the half-boiled default.

places.name: Sultan Mosque & Arab Street
places.description: Mosque interior open to non-Muslims 10am–12pm. Malay Heritage Centre courtyard next door. Arab Street fabric shops, Haji Lane murals.

places.name: Hjh Maimunah Restaurant
places.description: Michelin Bib Gourmand nasi padang since 1992 at 11 Jalan Pisang. Point-and-pick: beef rendang, curry squid in squid ink, fried chicken, fish, vegetables. Arrive 11:45 to beat the 12–2pm queue.
places.pregnancyNotes: Everything fully cooked. Skip sambal belacan (raw shrimp paste) and pickled sides. Beef rendang + curry + greens + rice is safe.

places.name: Flower Dome (Gardens by the Bay)
places.description: Current seasonal floral display. AC, gentle walking, ~45 min. First stop in the Gardens bundle. MRT Downtown Line: Bencoolen → Bayfront, then 5 min walk through the underpass.
places.pregnancyNotes: AC throughout, benches available.

reservation.notes: Already purchased — bring your QR codes. Tickets cover Flower Dome, Cloud Forest, and Botero exhibition. Scan separately at each venue.

places.name: Cloud Forest
places.description: Cool, misty AC. 35m indoor waterfall, Jurassic World animatronic dinosaurs. Spiral walkways with lifts.
places.pregnancyNotes: Take the lifts on the spirals. Cool climate is welcome.
tips: Covered by the bundle QR code — scan at entrance.

places.name: Botero: Heart of Volume
places.description: Largest Botero exhibition in the world — Singapore is the only SE Asia stop. ~130 original paintings, drawings, and sculptures. At IMBA Theatre, West Lawn beside Bayfront Plaza. Last admission Mon–Thu 6pm.
places.pregnancyNotes: AC throughout, benches available — gallery pace.
tips: Covered by the bundle QR code. Natural last stop before walking east to dinner.

places.name: Satay by the Bay
places.description: Hawker centre inside the Gardens. Chicken satay, Hainanese chicken rice, sugar cane juice. 15–20 min golden-hour walk east through the gardens from Botero.
places.pregnancyNotes: Stick to grilled and cooked stalls. Satay fully cooked.

places.name: Garden Rhapsody
places.description: Supertrees synchronised to music — 10 minutes of magic. Sit on the grass at OCBC Garden Plaza. Free, nightly.

places.name: Antler & Ember (hotel restaurant)
places.description: Hotel restaurant breakfast before the Southern Ridges walk.
places.pregnancyNotes: Ask for hard-boiled eggs.

places.name: Mount Faber Peak
places.description: Hilltop park with panoramic harbour views, small Merlion statue. Shaded, gentle paths. MRT Bencoolen → HarbourFront (25 min), then 10 min uphill walk.
places.pregnancyNotes: Gentle stairs from HarbourFront — take it slow. Benches everywhere.

places.name: Henderson Waves bridge
places.description: Singapore's highest pedestrian bridge, 36m above the road. Seven undulating wooden ribs create sheltered alcoves with benches. Treetop-level views, never crowded. Wheelchair-accessible. Free cold-drink vending machines.
places.pregnancyNotes: Wide deck, gentle incline, sheltered alcoves. Bring water.
tips: 15 min via Marang Trail — gentle downhill paved path from Mount Faber.

places.name: Telok Blangah Hill Park (optional)
places.description: Other end of Henderson Waves. Terraced gardens, Alkaff Mansion. Forest Walk continuation closed until July 2026. Skip if tired and turn back over the bridge.
places.pregnancyNotes: Optional — turn back if energy is low.

places.name: VivoCity Food Republic
places.description: AC mall food court at 1 HarbourFront Walk. Varied hawker-style stalls, ~SGD 12–18pp. Walk down from the trail or MRT 1 stop from HarbourFront.
places.pregnancyNotes: Stick to thoroughly cooked options.

places.name: Helix Bridge walk to MBS
places.description: DNA-helix structure lit at dusk. Sunset stroll across Marina Bay to MBS.

places.name: CÉ LA VI SkyBar
places.description: Walk-in rooftop bar at Marina Bay Sands Tower 3, Level 57. SGD 35 cover fully redeemable on drinks and food. Virgin cocktail menu. Arrive 6:30pm for sunset before the dinner-booking crowd peaks.
places.pregnancyNotes: Real mocktail menu — ask the bartender. No raw seafood in bar bites.
tips: Strict dress code: covered shoes, sleeved shirt, long pants.
Walk-in only — regular seats don't accept bookings.

places.name: Spectra at MBS Event Plaza
places.description: Free 9pm show. Watching at water level puts the lasers and fountains right in front of you — more dramatic than from the rooftop.
places.pregnancyNotes: Standing show — find a bench nearby if needed.

places.name: Oh Wunder Cafe
places.description: Sit-down brunch at 231 Bain St, #01-69 Bras Basah Complex. Mentaiko salmon spaghetti, steak & eggs, lemon tart, Wunderfolks pastries.
places.pregnancyNotes: Order steak medium-well; no runny eggs.

places.name: Sri Mariamman & Buddha Tooth Relic Temples
places.description: Sri Mariamman first (~20 min, colourful gopuram), then Buddha Tooth (~45 min) — don't miss the rooftop garden with the prayer wheel. Cover shoulders and knees.
places.pregnancyNotes: Gentle walking pace. Cover-up required.

places.name: Chinatown shophouse streets
places.description: Pagoda St (heritage shophouses, red lanterns), Smith St, Temple St (antiques, calligraphy), Sago Lane. The Sri Mariamman gopuram + Pagoda St shot is the iconic Chinatown photo.
places.pregnancyNotes: Flat, mostly shaded with five-foot ways.

places.name: Maxwell Food Centre
places.description: 1 Kadayanallur St. Ah Tai Hainanese Chicken Rice (#01-07) — ex-Tian Tian chef. Marina South fried carrot cake. Lao Ban soya beancurd dessert. Crowds thin after 1pm.
places.pregnancyNotes: Chicken rice and carrot cake fully cooked. Skip oyster omelette stalls.

places.name: Telok Ayer & Ann Siang Hill
places.description: Thian Hock Keng temple on Telok Ayer St, then up Ann Siang Rd through restored shophouses and café-lined streets. Stop for an iced drink. OPTIONAL — skip if energy is low.
places.pregnancyNotes: Some inclines — use building lifts if tired. Optional.

places.name: Singapore River bumboat cruise
places.description: 40-min seated cruise from Clarke Quay jetty. Passes Cavenagh Bridge, Fullerton, the Merlion, MBS. Sunset over the river. Audio narration.
places.pregnancyNotes: Seated, gentle, comfortable.

reservation.notes: Book on Klook for the 6:30pm slot.

places.name: XiaoYanZi Tomato Hot Pot
places.description: Famous fresh tomato broth at 6 Eu Tong Sen St, #03-87 Clarke Quay Central. Get the dual broth (half tomato + half mala). Free-flow drinks, fresh fruit, soft-serve ice cream. Angus beef, fish balls, vegetables cooked at the table.
places.pregnancyNotes: Tomato broth side is mild and pregnancy-friendly. Cook everything thoroughly. Skip raw seafood add-ons.
tips: Walk-in usually fine, or book via Chope for a guaranteed table.

places.name: Chin Mee Chin Confectionery
places.description: Legendary Katong kaya toast at 204 East Coast Rd. Charcoal-toasted bread, generous kaya. Many say better than Ya Kun. MRT ~30 min from hotel.
places.pregnancyNotes: Ask for HARD-BOILED eggs. Kaya is safe (cooked egg + coconut + sugar).

places.name: Koon Seng Road shophouses
places.description: Pastel Peranakan shophouses — the photo stop. East Coast Rd murals, Rumah Bebe for beaded slippers and batik.
places.pregnancyNotes: Flat walk, fine.

places.name: 328 Katong Laksa
places.description: Use the 216 East Coast Rd branch (Google 4.2) — same recipe, better-rated than the original at #51. Noodles cut short — eat with a spoon. Add an otah on the side.
places.pregnancyNotes: ORDER "no cockles" — broth, prawns, and fishcake are fully cooked and safe.

places.name: Changi Airport — store luggage
places.description: Left-luggage at T1 or T3, ~SGD 14/bag for 24h. Then head to Jewel.
tips: Grab fallback ~SGD 30 if exhausted with bags.
Jewel connects to T1, T2, T3 by walkway or Skytrain.

places.name: Jewel — Rain Vortex & Forest Valley
places.description: World's tallest indoor waterfall (40m). Walk under the Rain Vortex for free. Shiseido Forest Valley indoor terraced garden. Lifts and benches throughout.
places.pregnancyNotes: Lifts and benches throughout — comfortable.

places.name: Browse Jewel shops
places.description: Wander the shops, find your dinner spot, sit and people-watch. AC throughout, plenty of seating.
places.pregnancyNotes: AC, plenty of seating.

places.name: Jewel B2 dinner
places.description: Last Singapore meal. Tim Ho Wan dim sum [4.2], Five Star Hainanese Chicken Rice [4.0], or Burger & Lobster [4.3].
places.pregnancyNotes: Dim sum fully cooked. Skip raw shrimp dumplings if any.

places.name: Rain Vortex light show
places.description: 9pm nightly — the waterfall lights up with synchronised music. Your final Singapore moment before the terminal.

places.name: Changi Airport (departure)
places.description: Near-midnight flight home. Pick up bags from left-luggage, transit to your departure terminal via Skytrain. Be at the gate 2 hours before.
tips: Skytrain connects all terminals — no Grab needed once at the airport.
